name: Chex and Chocolate Party Mix
recipeIngredient: 9 cups Your favorite chex brand - cereals
12 oz Package (2 cups) semi-sweet chocolate morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees.
2. Combine cereal, coconut and peanuts in a large roasting pan.
3. In a small saucepan over medium heat, heat brown sugar, butter, and corn syrup until boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Without stirring, boil for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in vanilla and baking soda.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the cereal mixture.
7. Stir to ensure even coating.
8. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
9. Cool, stirring frequently until fully cooled.
10. Stir in chocolate morsels and raisins.
11. Store in an airtight container.
